title: Tirhaqah #8640
definition:
Tirhakah = "he searched out the pious: he searched out the waiter"

 1) king of Ethiopia and Egypt in the time of Sennacherib
nasbUsage:

 1) king of Ethiopia and Egypt in the time of Sennacherib
